debug_info.goal:
x y : EnchantedForest.Introduction.Bird
kestrel_application :
  EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x =
    EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K y
⊢ x = y

proof:
have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      simp_all
failed_attempts:
have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      have h2 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := K.call y x
      rw [kestrel_application] at h2
      exact h1.symm.trans h2

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y

      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 := K.call x y

      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      have h2 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := K.call y x
      rw [kestrel_application] at h2
      exact Eq.trans (Eq.symm h2) h1

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
      rw [← h1, ← h2, kestrel_application]

have h1 := K.call x y
      have h2 := K.call y y
